# Load documents
def load_documents(docs_dir: Path) -> Dict[str, str]:
    docs = {}
    if not docs_dir.exists():
        return docs
    for p in docs_dir.glob('*.txt'):
        key = p.stem  # e.g., sample_resume
        try:
            text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
        except Exception:
            text = p.read_text(errors='ignore')
        docs[key] = text
    return docs

# Document loading
def load_documents(docs_dir: Path) -> Dict[str, str]:
    docs = {}
    if not docs_dir.exists():
        return docs
    for p in docs_dir.glob('*.txt'):
        key = p.stem
        try:
            text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
        except Exception:
            text = p.read_text(errors='ignore')
        docs[key] = text
    return docs

# Regex patterns

}

def build_tfidf_index(snippets: List[str]):
    from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer
    from sklearn.metrics.pairwise import cosine_similarity
    vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer(lowercase=True, stop_words='english')
    X = vectorizer.fit_transform(snippets)
    return vectorizer, X, cosine_similarity

thlib import Path
from typing import Dict, List, Tuple, Any

PDF_URL = 'https://sample-files.com/downloads/documents/pdf/fillable-form.pdf'
PDF_PATH = Path('/app/fillable_form.pdf')
DOCS_DIR = Path('/app/documents')
OUT_JSON = Path('/app/field_mapping.json')

# PDF field extraction
def load_pdf_fields(pdf_path: Path) -> Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]:
    try:
        from pypdf import PdfReader
        reader = PdfReader(str(pdf_path))
        fields = None
        try:
            fields = reader.get_fields()
        except Exception:
            fields = None
        if not fields:
            fields = {}
            try:
                root = reader.trailer.get('/Root')
                acroform = root.get('/AcroForm') if root else None
                if acroform and '/Fields' in acroform:
                    for f in acroform['/Fields']:
                        try:
                            name = f.get('/T')
                            if name is None:
                                continue
                            fields[name] = {'/T': name, '/FT': f.get('/FT'), '/TU': f.get('/TU'), '/TM': f.get('/TM'), '/Ff': f.get('/Ff')}
                        except Exception:
                            pass
            except Exception:
                pass
        norm: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
        if isinstance(fields, dict):
            for k, v in fields.items():
                t = k
                if isinstance(v, dict):
                    t = v.get('/T') or v.get('T') or k
                norm[k] = {'field_name': str(t)}
        else:
            for item in (fields or []):
                k = str(item.get('/T') or item.get('T'))
                if k:
                    norm[k] = {'field_name': k}
        return norm
    except Exception:
        from PyPDF2 import PdfReader
        reader = PdfReader(str(pdf_path))
        fields = reader.get_fields()
        norm = {}
        for k, v in (fields or {}).items():
            t = v.get('/T') or v.get('T') or k
            norm[k] = {'field_name': str(t)}
        return norm

# Document loading
def load_documents(docs_dir: Path) -> Dict[str, str]:
    docs = {}
    if not docs_dir.exists():
        return docs
    for p in docs_dir.glob('*.txt'):
        key = p.stem
        try:
            text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
        except Exception:
            text = p.read_text(errors='ignore')
        docs[key] = text
    return docs

# Regex patterns
REGEXES = {
    'email': re.compile(r'[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\\.[A-Za-z]{2,}')
}
